title: Lesson 378: 王, 王, 追う...

items.gloss: king; ruler; sovereign; monarch; tycoon; magnate; champion; master; king (of the senior player)
to chase; to run after; to pursue; to follow after; to follow (a set order, a trend, etc.); to drive out; to get rid of; to oust; to expel; to drive (e.g. a herd); to be pressed (e.g. for time)
to respond; to satisfy; to accept; to comply with; to apply for
crossing; traversing; traversing horizontally; passing west to east (or east to west); cutting horizontally
